observation.summary: Secret redaction decisions are observed through C7 policy, ToolRef args, and C2 EventIngestor tests.

hypothesis.summary: Security docs must not redefine redaction markers outside the redaction SSOT.

execution.summary: Run redaction/audit tests, toolargs/toolpolicy tests, and the doc drift verifier.

evaluation.summary: Tests prove marker generation, safe-value behavior, second-pass redaction, PolicyViolationDetected audit append, and no marker/catalog redefinition outside the SSOT.

retrospective.summary: When security hub docs need redaction details, they link to the redaction SSOT instead of restating marker/catalog rules.

evidence.proves: security docs do not redefine redaction marker/catalog details outside the SSOT
